ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drawings" (
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drawing */,
  "drawing_number" TEXT /* Drawing number assigned to the drawing */,
  "sheet_number" TEXT /* Sheet number within the drawing set */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision number of the drawing */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the drawing was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drawing */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the drawing (e.g., mechanical, electrical) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the drawing (e.g., PDF, DWG) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* File size of the drawing in bytes */,
  "drawing_type" TEXT /* Type of drawing (e.g., 2D, 3D) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the drawing (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawings_drawing_number FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_number") REFERENCES revisions ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drawing the revision belongs to */,
  "revision_number" TEXT /* Revision number */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the revision */,
  "reason_for_revision" TEXT /* Reason for the revision (e.g., design change, error correction) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the department */,
  "head_of_department" TEXT /* Name of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the author belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the reviewer belongs to */,
  "reviewer_qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the reviewer (e.g., engineer, architect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drawing being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the drawing */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the drawing was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_access_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, reviewer, admin) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "user_qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the user (e.g., engineer, architect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_approvals" (
  "approval_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each approval event */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drawing being approved */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reviewer who approved the drawing */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the drawing was approved */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the approval (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the reviewer during approval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("approval_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_approvals_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_approvals_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_distribution" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution event */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drawing being distributed */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the drawing */,
  "distribution_date" TEXT /* Date when the drawing was distributed */,
  "medium" TEXT /* Medium of distribution (e.g., email, print) */,
  "distribution_status" TEXT /* Status of the distribution (e.g., sent, received, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_distribution_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES recipients ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_distribution_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "recipient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the recipient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the recipient belongs to */,
  "recipient_qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the recipient (e.g., engineer, architect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drawing the change belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., addition, deletion, modification) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_history_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drawing the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_versions_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drawing */,
  "related_drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related drawing */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, sibling) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_relationships_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drawing_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "drawing_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drawing */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drawing_tags_drawing_id FOREIGN KEY ("drawing_id") REFERENCES drawings ("drawing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
